docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE SERVED NOV-26-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, PEDRO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2015 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, PEDRO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $910.00 FILED BY REAL, MARGARITO AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, PEDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REAL, MARGARITO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, PEDRO PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF'S WITNESSES AURORA LOPEZ AND ARMANDO LOPEZ ARE SWORN AND EXAMINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REAL, MARGARITO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-23-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
